error_signature: Date picker does not show initial value in Date mode
title: Date picker initial value issue in Date mode
symptom: The DateTime picker displays 'Select a date' as a placeholder instead of the initial date value when set to Date mode.
root_cause: The DateTime picker is not properly handling the initial value when switched to Date mode, leading to a default placeholder being shown instead of the expected date.
fix_steps: Ensure the input value is formatted correctly as 'YYYY-MM-DD'
Use the split method to isolate the date part from any timestamp
Assign the formatted date to the DateTime picker
agent_instruction: Format the date input to 'YYYY-MM-DD' by splitting the timestamp and assign it to the DateTime picker.
